subject: fix(pdf): comprehensive print output cleanup — pagination, layout, dark mode, interactive elements
body:
The initial Save as PDF button worked but produced poor print output:
paginated to 25 rows, showed mobile cards instead of table, leaked dark
mode styles, and left interactive elements (chart toggles, form inputs,
banners) visible on paper.

This commit addresses all of those issues:

- beforeprint/afterprint in TransactionTable bypasses pagination to
  show all transactions (not just the current 25-row page)
- print-show CSS utility forces desktop table layout in print (A4
  width < sm breakpoint was showing mobile cards instead)
- beforeprint/afterprint in AppLayout temporarily removes .dark class
  for light-mode print (direct DOM toggle, no reactive side effects)
- ApexCharts @media print CSS hides toolbar, forces readable text
  colors on white paper regardless of dark mode
- no-print on chart toggle buttons, cash-on-hand input, AppLayout
  banners (update/offline/install prompt)
- Cash-on-hand shows as static text in print instead of <input>

Tags: pdf, print, ux, dark-mode, a11y
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
